title: AsyncAPI Operation
description: An AsyncAPI 3.x Operation — describes an action (send or receive) the application performs on a referenced channel. Operations are first-class in 3.0, separated from channels.

action.description: The action the application performs. `send` = the application produces messages to the channel. `receive` = the application consumes messages from the channel.

channel.description: Reference Object pointing to the channel this operation targets. Typically `{ "$ref": "#/channels/userSignedUp" }`.

security.description: Security requirements applied to this operation.

bindings.description: Protocol-specific operation bindings (kafka.groupId, mqtt.qos, amqp.expiration, etc.).

traits.description: List of operation traits merged into the operation (reusable fragments).

messages.description: Subset of messages from the referenced channel that this operation handles. Each item is a Reference Object pointing into the channel's messages map.

reply.description: Defines a request/reply pattern: the channel + messages used for the reply.
